name: json-form
title: Json Form
author: ilinxa
description: Schema-driven form renderer — declarative field DSL compiled to Zod, 25 built-in field types (incl. `richtext` via Plate), conditional + computed fields, extensible renderer registry, RHF v7 + zod v4 substrate. Cross-registry deps on @ilinxa/code-block (lazy `code` field) and @ilinxa/article-body-01 (lazy `richtext` field).
